evals.prompt: Review this skill draft that says Figma supports only four effects and can always write to canvas.
evals.expected_output: Flags outdated effect claim, runtime-gates canvas writes, and recommends current-source checks.

evals.prompt: Audit this report claiming it synced production UI into Figma, but it has no readback or screenshots.
evals.expected_output: Treats the mutation as unverified and requests concrete evidence or a corrected claim.
